Episodes.Title: The One Where No One Proposes
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Sherry Bilsing
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Rachel, Ross and Joey get together and figure out that no one was actually going to propose; Mr. Geller walks in on Monica and Chandler having sex.

Episodes.Title: The One Where Emma Cries
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Dana Klein
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Chandler, having trouble getting enough sleep at home, falls asleep in a meeting and accidentally agrees to run his company's Tulsa office.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Pediatrician
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Brian Buckner
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Joey arranges a blind date for Phoebe. Chandler is leaving for Tulsa without Monica, because she has got a great job offer.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Sharks
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Andrew Reich
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Monica thinks that Chandler is sexually attracted to sea life after he switches the station from porn to a shark documentary to conceal his sordid viewing.

Episodes.Title: The One with Phoebe's Birthday Dinner
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Scott Silveri
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Phoebe will celebrate her birthday by having a dinner with her friends at a fancy restaurant. But everybody is late to the dinner, due to a series of problems.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Male Nanny
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Looking for a new nanny, Ross and Rachel hire a male nanny named Sandy. Monica tells Chandler that a guy at work is the funniest guy she has ever met.

Episodes.Title: The One with Ross's Inappropriate Song
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Robert Carlock
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Ross finds a way to make Emma laugh - singing "Baby Got Back." Meanwhile, Phoebe meets Mike's parents, and Joey and Chandler find a video tape in Richard's apartment.

Episodes.Title: The One with Rachel's Other Sister
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Shana Goldberg-Meehan
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Rachel's middle sister shows up at Thanksgiving and causes arguments amongst the gang.

Episodes.Title: The One with Rachel's Phone Number
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Mark Kunerth
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Rachel is ready to start hanging out again. She and Phoebe go to a bar, where they meet two guys.

Episodes.Title: The One with Christmas in Tulsa
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Doty Abrams
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Chandler must spend Christmas in Tulsa, which Monica thinks he might have an affair with a former Miss Oklahoma runner-up while he is there. Chandler comes home early to announce that he quit his job.

Episodes.Title: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Peter Tibbals
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Chandler starts looking for a job and is anxious about having a baby, Rachel decides to go back to work, and Phoebe works as an extra on Joey's show.

Episodes.Title: The One with Phoebe's Rats
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Brian Buckner
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Ross makes Joey stay away from their new nanny. Mike accidentally kills Phoebe's rat. Gavin gives Rachel a scarf and a kiss for her birthday.

Episodes.Title: The One Where Monica Sings
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Steven Rosenhaus
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: A night at Mike's piano bar gives Monica a very showy moment in the spotlight; Chandler employs his secret skill to repair Joey's botched eyebrow-waxing job.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Blind Dates
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Sherry Bilsing
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Phoebe and Joey purposely set Ross and Rachel up on bad dates in the hopes they'll get back together. Monica and Chandler babysit Emma.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Mugging
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Peter Tibbals
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Joey gets a part in a stage-play in a painful way. Ross and Phoebe are mugged outside Central Perk, Phoebe realizes that she mugged Ross 18 years ago. Chandler starts his new career as an advertising writer.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Boob Job
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Mark Kunerth
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: When Monica and Chandler both ask Joey for money not wanting the other to know why they are asking for it, Chandler sees that Joey gave money to Monica. Joey makes up that Monica is getting a boob job.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Memorial Service
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Brian Buckner
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: When Chandler and Ross joke around on their college website, Ross is accused of being dead which leads to the fact that he was not popular in college.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Lottery
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Sherry Bilsing
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Hoping to win a huge jackpot, the friends pool their money and buy dozens of lottery tickets. However, they bicker over how to spend the fortune if they win, and Monica irritates everyone else by buying tickets just for her and Ch...

Episodes.Title: The One with Rachel's Dream
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Mark Kunerth
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Nervous about his upcoming romantic scenes, Joey rehearses them with Rachel. Ross & Chandler get their money's worth on their weekend trip to Vermont while Phoebe takes advantage of Monica's clientele.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Soap Opera Party
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Andrew Reich
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Joey throws a cast party on the roof of his building where he ends up making out with an attractive professor that Ross had a crush on.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Fertility Test
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Robert Carlock
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Joey comes to Ross for advice on dating Charlie. Chandler and Monica bump into Janice at a fertility clinic. Rachel has a gift certificate for a massage which Phoebe doesn't want her to use.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Donor
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Andrew Reich
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Rachel take Joey's girlfriend Charlie and Phoebe shopping. Ross presents his theory to get a chance to go a conference in Barbados. Monica and Chandler consider alternate pregnancy options.

Episodes.Title: The One in Barbados
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Shana Goldberg-Meehan
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: The gang heads down to Barbados for the palaeontology conference.
